LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT PHILIP HAMMOND'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGEMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT HAS SHOWN THAT HIS FAILURE TO RESPOND TO THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT WAS THE RESULT OF SURPRISE, MISTAKE OR EXCUSABNLE NEGLECT. RESPONSIVE PLEADING TO BE FILED BY SEPTEMBER 8, 2011. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: SONIA WONG, CSR #11288
